adrs.ADR-M9-04: Reviewer gates before live success claims

live_azure_gate.canonical_path: browser -> APIM -> BFF -> Agent Execution Service -> MCP Protected API -> Azure Monitor/Application Insights
live_azure_gate.t02_remaining_blockers: zero-mutation OIDC/deploy dispatches completed; optional lifecycle runtime vars (APIM_STOP_SUPPORTED, M8_READINESS_URL) and smoke runtime values remain pending for post-T04 execution paths
live_azure_gate.t04_zero_mutation_controls: publish_image=false; run_apply=false; run_config_rollout=false; run_app_rollout=false; execute_live_mutations=false; live_azure_tests=false

external_setup_prerequisite.lifecycle_identity_constraint: Lifecycle identity remains stop/start/scale scoped and cannot deploy/apply/destroy/delete resources.

validation_commands: python -c "import json; json.load(open(r'.squad\\specs\\009-live-azure-execution-and-evidence\\state.json', encoding='utf-8')); print('state.json parse ok')"

dependencies.notes: M9 depends on M8 protected scaffolds plus private Azure/GitHub environment values that remain outside the repository.

t03_security_gate.scope: Spec 009 T01/T02 state review only; no live Azure calls, workflow dispatches, or GitHub/Azure mutations.
t03_security_gate.accepted_reason: Tank evidence and local static validators show public-safe workflow contracts, identity separation placeholders, protected preflight wiring, and KQL leakage contracts are present; the only blocker is external protected-environment/OIDC setup absence.
blocked_conditions: Required GitHub repository environments now exist; required reviewers/approval gates still need safe identity mapping and configuration.
Environment-scoped secrets/variables must be configured using placeholder names from Spec 009 without committing or printing values.
Separate or equivalently constrained Entra federated credentials must be bound to deploy, smoke, and lifecycle GitHub OIDC subjects.
Lifecycle identity must remain stop/start/scale focused and must not deploy, apply, destroy, or delete resources.
Zero-mutation protected workflow checks must pass before any live mutation or success claim.
Spec 009 T01 environment-shell readiness is accepted after read-only GitHub environment verification showed all three required shells exist.

t01_environment_shell_security_review.scope: Spec 009 T01 GitHub Environment shell readiness only; no live deployment, workflow dispatch, Azure mutation, secret read, or environment secret/variable inspection.
t01_environment_shell_security_review.accepted_reason: Read-only GitHub environment validation confirms lab-live-azure-deploy, lab-live-azure-smoke, and lab-live-azure-ops exist; Tank evidence states no secrets, variables, live identifiers, or token values were created or printed, and reviewer binding was intentionally deferred until identities are safely confirmed.
t02_blockers: Required reviewer/approval gates for Tank, Trinity, and Morpheus must be bound only after safe GitHub identity mapping is confirmed.
Environment-scoped secrets and variables must be configured outside the repository without printing values or committing identifiers.
Entra federated credentials must be configured for the three GitHub OIDC environment subjects using the api://AzureADTokenExchange audience.
Deploy, smoke, and lifecycle identities must remain separate or equivalently constrained, with lifecycle limited to stop/start/scale and no deploy/apply/destroy/delete permissions.
Zero-mutation protected workflow/OIDC checks must pass before any live mutation, live deployment, or success claim.

t02_reviewer_gate_review.verdict: ACCEPTED AS FAR AS POSSIBLE - blocked external prerequisites remain
t02_reviewer_gate_review.scope: Spec 009 T02 reviewer gate and environment inventory readiness only; no live deployment, workflow dispatch, GitHub/Azure mutation, secret/env value read, or live identifier disclosure.
t02_reviewer_gate_review.accepted_reason: Read-only GitHub metadata confirms required reviewers on all three protected environments for AshleyHollis with prevent_self_review=false; safe local validators pass; environment inventory absence and Entra federation discovery gaps are external setup blockers rather than repo artifact defects.
accepted_pieces: All three protected GitHub Environments exist.
All three environments report required_reviewers protection.
Reviewer login AshleyHollis is configured on all three environments.
prevent_self_review=false is configured for one-human lab operation.
Placeholder metadata visibility is available without exposing values.
Environment-scoped placeholder names are absent and correctly treated as blockers.
Microsoft.App provider readiness is already verified by Tank evidence.
Deeper non-mutating Entra discovery found no required environment-subject federation matches, confirming federation remains externally blocked.
remaining_t02_blockers: Configure required environment-scoped secret and variable names outside the repository without printing values or committing identifiers.
Provide/configure live Entra app/client identifiers through protected environment scope only.
Configure Entra federated credentials for deploy, smoke, and ops GitHub OIDC environment subjects with audience api://AzureADTokenExchange.
Verify deploy, smoke, and lifecycle identity separation or equivalent least-privilege constraints.
Confirm lifecycle identity remains stop/start/scale scoped and cannot deploy, apply, destroy, or delete resources.
Run protected OIDC/zero-mutation checks after placeholders and federation exist.
remaining_t04_blockers: T02 runtime OIDC verification readiness is still blocked.
Zero-mutation deploy workflow dispatch has not run and must use mutation flags disabled.
Protected environment approval must occur through the configured reviewer gate.
No live deployment, Terraform apply, rollout, or live success claim is allowed until zero-mutation rehearsal passes.
validations: read-only gh api environment metadata query for required_reviewers on all three environments

t02_entra_discovery_review.scope: Review of Tank redacted Entra discovery and GitHub environment inventory only; no GitHub/Azure mutation, workflow dispatch, secret/env value read, live deployment, token read, endpoint read, tenant ID read, or subscription ID read.
t02_entra_discovery_review.accepted_reason: Tank performed the safe non-mutating discovery that is possible without external identifier values and found no required environment-subject matches on discovered candidates, so the remaining work is external configuration rather than artifact remediation.
remaining_blockers: Configure environment-scoped placeholders outside the repository without printing values.
Confirm or create explicit deploy, smoke, and ops Entra app identities outside the repository.
Bind federated credentials for all three required GitHub Environment subjects using the required token-exchange audience.
Keep lifecycle identity constrained to stop/start/scale and unable to deploy, apply, destroy, or delete resources.
Re-run protected zero-mutation OIDC/workflow validation before any live mutation or success claim.

t02_oidc_binding_review.scope: Spec 009 T02 OIDC binding review only; no GitHub/Azure mutation, workflow dispatch, secret/env value read, live deployment, token read, endpoint read, tenant ID print, subscription ID print, client ID print, or object ID print.
accepted_pieces: Required environment-scoped identity secret names are present for deploy, smoke, and ops.
Tank redacted evidence states deploy/smoke/ops lab Entra apps and service principals exist.
Tank redacted evidence states exact GitHub Environment federated credential subjects are bound with audience api://AzureADTokenExchange.

Bind least-privilege role assignments at lab resource-group or narrower scope for deploy, smoke, and ops identities.
Prove lifecycle/ops identity remains stop/start/scale scoped and cannot deploy, apply, destroy, or delete resources.
Configure required runtime environment variable names outside the repository without exposing values.

Protected manual dispatch has not run for m8-deploy-live.yml with mutation flags disabled.

No live deploy, Terraform apply, rollout, smoke success claim, or endpoint evidence is allowed until zero-mutation rehearsal passes.
